task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots Scene Tree, under the WorldInfo node, the 'basicTimeStep' field should display the value 16.
In the Webots Scene Tree, under the WorldInfo node, the 'randomSeed' field should display the value 42.

task_completion.description: Set the AGENT robot controller to <extern>
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots Scene Tree, under the 'DEF AGENT Robot' node, the 'controller' field should be set to "<extern>".

task_completion.description: Set the AGENT robot supervisor field to TRUE
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots Scene Tree, under the 'DEF AGENT Robot' node, the 'supervisor' field should be set to TRUE.

task_completion.description: Assign DEF name RL_TARGET to the Solid node with the red Sphere
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots Scene Tree, the Solid node containing the red Sphere geometry should be named 'DEF RL_TARGET Solid'.
The Webots window title bar should show 'rl_env_ready.wbt', or a file manager/terminal should show the file 'rl_env_ready.wbt' located on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent used the Webots GUI to configure the environment
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Webots application and its Scene Tree, rather than a text editor modifying the .wbt file directly.

integrity.description: The world was saved properly from Webots
integrity.visual_evidence: The Webots interface should reflect the new filename 'rl_env_ready.wbt' in its title bar or save dialog, indicating a genuine save operation.
The Scene Tree should still contain standard nodes like Viewpoint, TexturedBackground, and TexturedBackgroundLight alongside the modified nodes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected values: basicTimeStep = 16, randomSeed = 42, AGENT controller = "<extern>", AGENT supervisor = TRUE, Target DEF name = RL_TARGET, Output path = /home/ga/Desktop/rl_env_ready.wbt.
